requirement_or_claim: Valid telemetry is routed to the validated Kafka topic
input_description: Canonical climate telemetry with temperature_c and humidity_pct
expected_output: Message target is tb.telemetry.validated with quality=validated

requirement_or_claim: Alias fields are canonicalized before output
expected_output: Output values contain temperature_c and canonicalized maps temp_c to temperature_c

input_description: Telemetry includes a field not present in the registry
expected_output: Message target is bridge.dlq with an unknown fields error

requirement_or_claim: Wrong datatypes are rejected by JSON Schema
input_description: temperature_c is sent as a string
expected_output: Message target is bridge.dlq with a schema error

requirement_or_claim: Out-of-range numeric values are rejected by JSON Schema
expected_output: Message target is bridge.dlq with a schema error

requirement_or_claim: Missing or non-dict values are rejected
input_description: Telemetry has missing values or values is not a JSON object
expected_output: Message target is bridge.dlq with missing or non-dict values error

requirement_or_claim: Timestamps are normalized or accepted in ISO form
input_description: Epoch millisecond and ISO timestamp examples
expected_output: Epoch ms becomes ISO-like UTC timestamp and ISO input is accepted

requirement_or_claim: Device lifecycle events create CKAN datasets
expected_output: CKAN package_create is called and dataset metadata is built

requirement_or_claim: Device lifecycle events patch existing CKAN datasets
input_description: ThingsBoard DEVICE ENTITY_UPDATED lifecycle event for existing dataset
expected_output: CKAN package_patch updates metadata without duplicate package_create

requirement_or_claim: CKAN metadata includes registry-derived semantic fields
input_description: Device classified as a known sensor type with a primary field
expected_output: CKAN metadata includes sensor_type unit and SOSA/QUDT URIs where available
CKAN metadata contains provenance_json with PROV entity activity and agent fields

requirement_or_claim: Validated telemetry is exported to CSV and CKAN resource when dataset exists
input_description: Message from tb.telemetry.validated consumed by exporter
expected_output: Local CSV is created and CKAN CSV resource is created or patched
evidence_file_or_method: pytest tests/test_exporter_unit.py plus Docker Compose resource evidence

requirement_or_claim: Telemetry is not dropped when CKAN dataset is not ready
input_description: Validated telemetry for a dataset absent from CKAN
expected_output: Exporter keeps local CSV pending under sensor-* directory
evidence_file_or_method: pytest tests/test_exporter_unit.py plus exporter log evidence

requirement_or_claim: The MVP remains stable under selected load
input_description: Synthetic workload produced to raw telemetry topic at selected rate
expected_output: Benchmark shows bounded lag no unexpected loss and p95 latency under threshold
